summary: AgentOrchestra has a clearly described planning-and-routing mechanism, but its reported gains remain benchmark-specific and not cleanly causally isolated.

bounded_claims.claim_text: AgentOrchestra outperforms the listed comparison systems on SimpleQA.
bounded_claims.bounds: The result is empirically reported for SimpleQA, but the provided evidence does not isolate which components of the system caused the performance gap.

bounded_claims.claim_text: AgentOrchestra shows uneven performance across benchmarks and difficulty levels, with strong GAIA results but 25.9% on HLE, while added coordination also increases latency and computational overhead.
bounded_claims.bounds: The evidence supports a real tradeoff between strong performance on some tasks and added coordination cost, but it does not fully explain why HLE is much weaker or establish a single causal account for the benchmark spread.
